introSection: Formuła is a steel launched roller coaster located at Energylandia in Zator, Małopolskie, Poland. It was manufactured by Vekoma and opened in 2016 as the company's first new generation thrill coaster.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Formuła was the first Space Warp model from Vekoma. The ride is a compact launch coaster with of track, an LSM launch, and three inversions.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Formuła was the first coaster to utilize Vekoma's new generation trains with vest restraints.

fullText:
Formuła is a steel launched roller coaster located at Energylandia in Zator, Małopolskie, Poland. It was manufactured by Vekoma and opened in 2016 as the company's first new generation thrill coaster.

Formuła was the first Space Warp model from Vekoma. The ride is a compact launch coaster with of track, an LSM launch, and three inversions.

Formuła was the first coaster to utilize Vekoma's new generation trains with vest restraints.
